category_sources: source_facts.description says this is Neo4j official Model Context Protocol server for AI tools; official GitHub README identifies it as Neo4j official MCP Server.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Neo4j MCP; source_facts.name is neo4j-mcp.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Neo4j MCP documentation; official GitHub README links to the official Neo4j MCP documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/neo4j/mcp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions MCP and AI tools; official GitHub README describes access to Neo4j graph databases, MCP-compatible clients, graph schema, and Cypher queries.
